sources.evidence: Spotify is a multi-format audio platform centered on music, but also expanding into podcasts, audiobooks, and increasingly “creator formats” (like video in some markets).
Analytics (Spotify as an analytics platform) Spotify is interesting because it has three distinct analytics surfaces depending on who you are:
Spotify is a multi-format audio platform centered on music, but also expanding into podcasts, audiobooks, and increasingly “creator formats” (like video in some markets).

primary_problem.value: Instant listening and intent-driven listening along with collection, routine building, offline reliability, and low-bandwidth usage.

sources.evidence: Primary user 'jobs' Spotify solves (mobile) 1) Instant listening (zero friction)... 2) Intent-driven listening... 3) Collection + routine building... 4) Offline and commute reliability (Premium tiers)... 5) Lightweight usage in low-bandwidth contexts.
